mapper.sql: sc.class_id, sc.class_name, sc.grade_id, g.grade_name, sc.head_teacher_id, t.teacher_name as head_teacher_name
mapper.select:
select
from school_class sc join grade g on sc.grade_id = g.grade_id left join teacher t on sc.head_teacher_id = t.teacher_id where sc.class_id = #{classId}
mapper.insert: insert into school_class (class_name, grade_id, head_teacher_id) values (#{className}, #{gradeId}, #{headTeacherId})
